label: false-dup
a: Added a B-tree index on users(email) to speed up the login query (SELECT id, password_hash FROM users WHERE email = ?). Login is a high-frequency operation.
b: Added a composite index on users(created_at, status) for the admin dashboard user listing query, which filters by status and sorts by registration date. Different from the login index — this one supports range queries.
reviewer_notes: Two different indexes on the same users table for two different queries (login lookup vs admin listing). Different columns, different use cases.
